creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: wen
Date: Wed Sep 19 07:43:48 2012
New Revision: 304486
URL: http://svn.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/304486

Log:
  This port adds the Carrier Percentage Module to the Tryton Application Platform.
  
  WWW: http://www.tryton.org/
  
  PR:		171455
  Submitted by:	Matthias Petermann <matthias@d2ux.net>

Added:
  head/finance/trytond_carrier_percentage/
  head/finance/trytond_carrier_percentage/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/finance/trytond_carrier_percentage/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/finance/trytond_carrier_percentage/pkg-descr   (contents, props changed)
  head/finance/trytond_carrier_percentage/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)
Modified:
  head/finance/Makefile

Modified: head/finance/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/finance/Makefile	Wed Sep 19 07:40:37 2012	(r304485)
+++ head/finance/Makefile	Wed Sep 19 07:43:48 2012	(r304486)
@@ -109,6 +109,7 @@
     SUBDIR += trytond_account_product
     SUBDIR += trytond_calendar
     SUBDIR += trytond_carrier
+    SUBDIR += trytond_carrier_percentage
     SUBDIR += trytond_company
     SUBDIR += trytond_company_work_time
     SUBDIR += trytond_country

Added: head/finance/trytond_carrier_percentage/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/finance/trytond_carrier_percentage/Makefile	Wed Sep 19 07:43:48 2012	(r304486)
@@ -0,0 +1,25 @@
+# New ports collection makefile for:	trytond_carrier_percentage
+# Date created:		08 September, 2012
+# Whom:			Matthias Petermann<matthias@petermann.it>
+#
+# $FreeBSD$
+#
+
+PORTNAME=	trytond_carrier_percentage
+PORTVERSION=	2.4.1
+CATEGORIES=	finance python
+MASTER_SITES=	http://downloads2.tryton.org/${PORTVERSION:R}/
+
+MAINTAINER=	matthias@petermann.it
+COMMENT=	Tryton Application Platform (Carrier Percentage Module)
+
+LICENSE=	GPLv3
+
+RUN_DEPENDS=	trytond>=2.4.0:${PORTSDIR}/finance/trytond \
+		trytond_carrier>=2.4.1:${PORTSDIR}/finance/trytond_carrier \
+		trytond_currency>=2.4.0:${PORTSDIR}/finance/trytond_currency
+
+USE_PYTHON=	yes
+USE_PYDISTUTILS=easy_install
+
+.include <bsd.port.mk>

Added: head/finance/trytond_carrier_percentage/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/finance/trytond_carrier_percentage/distinfo	Wed Sep 19 07:43:48 2012	(r304486)
@@ -0,0 +1,2 @@
+SHA256 (trytond_carrier_percentage-2.4.1.tar.gz) = ca79ea0c032289deb562d0fb8503768515a5d9529cd656368a7cb9c336215269
+SIZE (trytond_carrier_percentage-2.4.1.tar.gz) = 19981

Added: head/finance/trytond_carrier_percentage/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/finance/trytond_carrier_percentage/pkg-descr	Wed Sep 19 07:43:48 2012	(r304486)
@@ -0,0 +1,3 @@
+This port adds the Carrier Percentage Module to the Tryton Application Platform.
+
+WWW: http://www.tryton.org/
